'''Kayala Ravein''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] from [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]].

She was the daughter of an [[Ravein|influential politician]] and lived a pampered life. However, her world was shattered when her mother was killed by a fleeing [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]]. This led her to take the law into her own hands. She became a free-range [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] operating under the name '''Ra Katana'''. She used her [[Personal Luxury Yacht 3000/Legends|Personal Luxury Yacht 3000]], the ''[[Mystic Wanderer]]'', as well as her father's influence and contacts to target criminals around [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], and bring them to justice.
